sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, str_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str_value) VALUES (1, 'abc123xyz'), (2, 'def456ghi'), (3, NULL), (4, 'ghi789abc');
SELECT id, regexp_substr('(\d+)', str_value) || ' matched' AS result FROM test_strings WHERE str_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, CONCAT('Value: ', regexp_substr('([a-z]+)', str_value)) AS extracted FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_substr('([a-z]+)', str_value) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY extracted;
CREATE TABLE test_pattern (id INT PRIMARY KEY, pattern_value VARCHAR(255));
SELECT tp.id, regexp_substr(tp.pattern_value, ts.str_value) || ' from ' || ts.str_value AS combined_result FROM test_pattern tp JOIN test_strings ts ON ts.str_value IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, regexp_substr('(2[34]).*(2[35])', str_value) || (CASE WHEN str_value IS NULL THEN ' NULLCASE' ELSE ' NOTNULL' END) AS complex_result FROM test_strings WHERE str_value IS NOT NULL OR str_value IS NULL;
SELECT id, (regexp_substr('(\d+)', str_value) || ', ' || str_value) AS final_output FROM test_strings GROUP BY str_value HAVING final_output IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(LENGTH(regexp_substr('(\d+)', str_value))) FROM test_strings WHERE str_value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_data (temp_id INT, value VARCHAR(255));
SELECT COALESCE(regexp_substr('^(.*)$', value), 'no match') || ' from temp_data' AS fallback_result FROM temp_data;
SELECT temp_id, LENGTH(regexp_substr('(test)', value)) AS test_length FROM temp_data WHERE LENGTH(value) > 0;
